verification.method: Open this manifest with a cache-busting query parameter and compare buildId plus sourceCommit with the deployed page readout.
verification.cachePolicy: The page fetches this file with cache: no-store and a cacheBust query parameter.
verification.sourceCommitPolicy: sourceCommit points to the final functional v0.27.4 commit containing the unified resource-flow ledger, same-tick transfer matching, persistence and rollback, consumption classification, verification tests and world-save app version; later README, roadmap, CODEX and manifest commits may follow it.
